skills.name: skill-orchestrator
skills.description: 技能编排 — 分析需求调用最合适skill。触发：需要多skill协作时。

skills.name: skill-template-layered-retrieval
skills.description: Template for building document Q&A systems with layered retrieval. Use this pattern when you need to query large structured documents (insurance policies, legal contracts, technical manuals) without overwhelming context limits. The pattern splits documents into hierarchical units (chapters/sections/paragraphs), stores in SQLite, and retrieves through a 3-layer filter (category → subsection → content). Triggers on phrases like "文档问答", "分层检索", "保险文档查询", "知识库问答", or any request to build a document retrieval system.

skills.name: skill-vetter
skills.description: Security-first skill vetting for AI agents. Use before installing any skill from ClawdHub, GitHub, or other sources. Checks for red flags, permission scope, and suspicious patterns.

skills.name: smart-browser
skills.description: AI增强的智能浏览器自动化 - 基于agent-browser，添加页面结构分析和智能数据提取

skills.name: spen-memory
skills.description: Agent 动态按需记忆系统 - 基于 SPEN 思想的轻量级记忆存储与检索。用于需要持久记忆、长程对话上下文管理的场景。支持多路检索、自动压缩、归档恢复、向量语义。

skills.name: story-architect
skills.description: 融合世界观设定、情节大纲、人物设计的创作系统，支持多种题材（科幻/奇幻/都市/历史）和素材库联动

skills.name: summarize
skills.description: Summarize URLs or files with the summarize CLI (web, PDFs, images, audio, YouTube).

skills.name: svg-card-generator
skills.description: SVG卡片生成器 - 将文本内容转换为优雅简洁的SVG卡片可视化。支持多种卡片模板和自定义配置。用于内容展示、社交媒体分享、概念可视化。适用场景：文案美化、概念卡片、读书笔记、金句分享。

skills.name: sw-data-scientist
skills.description: Structured data science workflow for EDA, feature engineering, modeling, and evaluation. Use when the user needs to analyze datasets, build predictive models, perform statistical analysis, or generate data-driven insights. Handles large analyses in chunked phases.

skills.name: mobile-debugging
skills.description: React Native debugging with Flipper, React DevTools, and crash analysis. Use for mobile app debugging or network request issues.

skills.name: system-health-reporter
skills.description: Generate system health reports with CPU, memory, disk, network diagnostics and recommendations.

skills.name: tapestry
skills.description: 知识图谱构建技能，用于文档关联和知识网络管理

skills.name: task-workflow
skills.description: Standardized Planning + Subagent + Progress Report workflow for complex tasks

skills.name: tavily
skills.description: AI-optimized web search via Tavily API. Returns concise, relevant results for AI agents.

skills.name: test-driven-development
skills.description: TDD workflow — RED-GREEN-REFACTOR cycle. Use when user wants to practice test-driven development or write tests before code.

skills.name: text-game-dev
skills.description: 离线版文字游戏（视觉小说/文字冒险）设计与开发全流程指导。适用于：(1) 设计游戏核心玩法机制 (2) 规划叙事结构与分支 (3) 选择游戏引擎 (4) 制作美术音效资源 (5) 实现存档系统 (6) 设计UI/UX (7) 规划多结局

skills.name: tmux
skills.description: Remote-control tmux sessions for interactive CLIs by sending keystrokes and scraping pane output.

skills.name: tools-ui
skills.description: Tool UI components for agent tool lifecycle visualization. Use when building interfaces that display tool calls, tool results, tool approval flows, or agent interactions. Provides React components for pending, running, success, and error states.

skills.name: using-git-worktrees
skills.description: Use when starting feature work that needs isolation from current workspace or before executing implementation plans - creates isolated git worktrees with smart directory selection and safety verification

skills.name: web-access
skills.description: 所有联网操作必须通过此 skill 处理，包括：搜索、网页抓取、登录后操作、网络交互等。

skills.name: web-artifacts-builder
skills.description: Suite of tools for creating elaborate, multi-component claude.ai HTML artifacts using modern frontend web technologies (React, Tailwind CSS, shadcn/ui). Use for complex artifacts requiring state management, routing, or shadcn/ui components - not for simple single-file HTML/JSX artifacts.

skills.name: webapp-testing
skills.description: Toolkit for interacting with and testing local web applications using Playwright. Supports verifying frontend functionality, debugging UI behavior, capturing browser screenshots, and viewing browser logs.

skills.name: workflow-automation
skills.description: Automate construction data workflows. Build ETL pipelines and DAG workflows for recurring tasks.

skills.name: writer
skills.description: Fix AI writing patterns that create repetitive and robotic content

skills.name: x-post-automation
skills.description: Automate X (Twitter) content creation and posting. Use when the user wants to generate high-engagement tweets, analyze trending topics, compose posts with viral potential, or automate their X posting workflow. Includes trend analysis, content generation, and direct posting capabilities.

skills.name: xlsx
skills.description: Comprehensive spreadsheet creation, editing, and analysis with support for formulas, formatting, data analysis, and visualization. When Claude needs to work with spreadsheets (.xlsx, .xlsm, .csv, .tsv, etc) for: (1) Creating new spreadsheets with formulas and formatting, (2) Reading or analyzing data, (3) Modify existing spreadsheets while preserving formulas, (4) Data analysis and visualization in spreadsheets, or (5) Recalculating formulas

skills.name: zeroclaw-driver
skills.description: Driver for ZeroClaw - lightweight Rust-based AI agent runtime. Use when user mentions ZeroClaw.
